title: Tattoo Gift Certificate Template, Editable Gothic Voucher for Ink Studio, Dark Luxury Canva Template, Printable Gift Card
description:
Looking for a professional way to offer gift certificates that matches your tattoo studio's dark aesthetic? This premium gothic-style gift certificate template is designed specifically for tattoo artists who want to create stunning, branded vouchers that clients will love to give and receive.

✨ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• 1 high-resolution gift certificate template (8.5" x 11")
• Editable text fields for studio name, amount, recipient details
• Professional dark luxury gothic design
• Canva link for instant editing
• PDF download instructions

🎨 HOW TO EDIT:
• Click the Canva link provided after purchase
• Replace placeholder text with your studio details
• Customize colors, fonts, and design elements
• Download as PDF for printing or PNG for digital use
• No design experience needed!

⚡ FEATURES:
• Instant download - ready to use in minutes
• Fully customizable in Canva (free account works)
• High-resolution print quality (300 DPI)
• Professional gothic aesthetic
• Commercial use included
• Works on any device with internet access

💼 PERFECT FOR:
• Tattoo studios and parlors
• Independent tattoo artists
• Piercing studios
• Body art businesses
• Holiday promotions and gift giving
• Last-minute client gifts

❓ FAQ:
Q: Do I need Canva Pro to edit this?
A: No! This template works with free Canva accounts.

Q: Can I print this at home?
A: Yes! The template is optimized for standard home and professional printing.

Q: Can I use this for my tattoo business?
A: Absolutely! Commercial use is included with your purchase.

📋 PLEASE NOTE:
This is a digital download only. No physical item will be shipped. Files will be available immediately after purchase.
source_why: Gift certificates are the #1 selling digital template for tattoo studios. High demand, low competition for premium dark/gothic aesthetic. Average seller price £4.99-£7.99. Buyers searching for editable, professional gift cards they can customise in Canva.
